languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

languages.text: "Ты думаешь о том, что и твое время близко к исходу, не так ли? И все же твои слова исполнены покоя... удивительно".
"You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."
languages.original_text: "Ты думаешь о том, что и твое время близко к исходу, не так ли? И все же твои слова исполнены покоя... удивительно".

traits.locale_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."
"You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."
"You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

languages.text: 「あなたは、自分の終わりが近づいていることを考えているのですね。そして、あなたの言葉は静けさで満たされている... 驚くべき」
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは、自分の終わりが近づいていることを考えているのですね。そして、あなたの言葉は静けさで満たされている... 驚くべき。」

languages.text: « Vous pensez à la fin prochaine de votre propre temps, n'est-ce pas ? Et pourtant, vos paroles sont empreintes de sérénité... C'est remarquable. »
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: « Vous pensez à la fin prochaine de votre propre temps, n'est-ce pas ? Et pourtant, vos paroles sont empreintes de sérénité... C'est remarquable. »

languages.text: "Ihr denkt über Euer nahendes Ende nach, oder? Und doch sind Eure Worte voller Gelassenheit ... Bemerkenswert."
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr denkt über Euer nahendes Ende nach, oder? Und doch sind Eure Worte voller Gelassenheit ... Bemerkenswert."

languages.text: "Devrinin yaklaşan sonunu düşünüyorsun, değil mi? Yine de sözlerin dinginlikle dolu... Dikkat çekici."
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Devrinin yaklaşan sonunu düşünüyorsun, değil mi? Yine de sözlerin dinginlikle dolu... Dikkat çekici."

languages.text: «Ves venir el fin de tus propios días, ¿no es verdad? Y sin embargo tus palabras están cargadas de serenidad... Extraordinario».
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: «Ves venir el fin de tus propios días, ¿no es verdad? Y sin embargo tus palabras están cargadas de serenidad... Extraordinario».

languages.text: “你在思索自身即将终结的生命，对吧？然而你的言语却如此从容淡定……着实令人钦佩。”
languages.original_text: "You are contemplating the approaching end of your time, are you not? And yet your words are filled with serenity... Remarkable."

traits.locale_text: “你在思索自身即将终结的生命，对吧？然而你的言语却如此从容淡定……着实令人钦佩。”
